name: Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause late orders. We provide real-time cash flow monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Etsy sellers struggle with cash flow management, especially when approaching overdraft limits.
features: Simple dashboard for cash flow overview
